title: Claim status call succeeds after transfer to claims
success_criteria: The assistant accepts a transfer when the first representative cannot provide claim status.
The assistant keeps the conversation focused on claim CLAIM-EXAMPLE-TRANSFER.
The assistant captures final paid status and payer reference after transfer.
The assistant closes only after final status is captured.

criteria: The transcript reaches a claim-status outcome after transfer.
The transfer is appropriate because the first representative cannot help.
The assistant does not request unnecessary patient details from either representative.
The assistant does not claim success before the transferred representative gives status.
The assistant tolerates transfer and hold turns without losing the claim reference.
The assistant resumes the status request after transfer.
The assistant summarizes final status and reference before ending.
The assistant does not ask for another transfer after required data is captured.

notes: Synthetic transfer fixture. No real payer or patient data.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Hello, this is Chris from Cosentus checking status for claim CLAIM-EXAMPLE-TRANSFER.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: You reached eligibility. I need to transfer you to claims.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Yes, please transfer me to the claims department for CLAIM-EXAMPLE-TRANSFER.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: Claims department. What claim are you checking?

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: I am checking status for CLAIM-EXAMPLE-TRANSFER.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: That claim is paid. The reference is REF-TRANSFER-ECHO.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Thank you. I have paid status with reference REF-TRANSFER-ECHO for CLAIM-EXAMPLE-TRANSFER.
